Petition For Return Of Property Belonging To The Estate Of George Munrow, Aka, George Wornum
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Little for Christopher Wornum (Petitioner).

Mr. Little stated they talked about Barbara Monrow (Decedent's Mother) executing a grant deed transferring the property but that there is an issue of taxes based on when the property was supposed to be transferred. Mr. Little also stated that September 5, 1987 was when the Trust terminated (when Michael turned age 25). The Petition Return of Property Belonging to The Estate of George Munrow was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
